content.p1: I laid my software development foundations in a C# environment, after which my interest turned towards modern frontend technologies, primarily Angular. I am drawn to visual implementation and user experience design, where results are immediately visible and measurable.
content.p2: Currently, I am expanding my knowledge in the Angular and NestJS ecosystem, while I plan to explore .NET Core and React in the future. Furthermore, I am open to learning other innovative technologies to create clean and responsive interfaces with a Fullstack mindset.
content.p3: My goal is continuous professional growth and writing long-term sustainable, clean code, whether in teamwork or independent projects.

projects.p: Below are some of the projects I have worked on. These projects reflect my passion and creativity for frontend development.

contact.p: If I’ve sparked your interest or you have any questions, feel free to send me a message!
